mapper.sql: n.id, n.user_id, n.title, n.content, n.type, n.biz_type, n.biz_id, n.is_read, n.read_at, n.sender_id, n.push_task_id, n.created_at, n.updated_at, n.is_deleted
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM yx_notification WHERE is_deleted = FALSE AND user_id = #{userId} AND is_read = FALSE

SELECT ,
FROM yx_notification n LEFT JOIN yx_user u ON n.sender_id = u.id AND u.is_deleted = FALSE WHERE n.id = #{id} AND n.is_deleted = FALSE
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO yx_notification ( user_id, title, content, type, biz_type, biz_id, sender_id, push_task_id ) VALUES
(#{item.userId}, #{item.title}, #{item.content}, #{item.type}, #{item.bizType}, #{item.bizId}, #{item.senderId}, #{item.pushTaskId})
mapper.update: UPDATE yx_notification SET is_read = TRUE, read_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = FALSE
UPDATE yx_notification SET is_read = TRUE, read_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_read = FALSE AND is_deleted = FALSE
UPDATE yx_notification SET is_deleted = TRUE, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = FALSE
